/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -O3 -march=native -ffast-math -funroll-loops -flto -ftree-vectorize -shared -flto=auto  -o cpp_mcts.cpython-38-x86_64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/cpp_mcts.dir/bindings.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpp_mcts.dir/Car.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpp_mcts.dir/IntersectionEnv.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpp_mcts.dir/IntersectionEnv_render.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpp_mcts.dir/Lidar.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpp_mcts.dir/RouteGen.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpp_mcts.dir/RoadMask.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpp_mcts.dir/LineMask.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpp_mcts.dir/TrafficFlow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpp_mcts.dir/mcts_search.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cpp_mcts.dir/Renderer.cpp.o   -L/lib/intel64  -L/lib/intel64_win  -L/lib/win-x64  -Wl,-rpath,/lib/intel64:/lib/intel64_win:/lib/win-x64:/home/g/anaconda3/envs/g308/lib/python3.8/site-packages/torch/lib:/usr/local/cuda-12.6/lib64 /home/g/anaconda3/envs/g308/lib/python3.8/site-packages/torch/lib/libtorch.so /home/g/anaconda3/envs/g308/lib/python3.8/site-packages/torch/lib/libc10.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcuda.so /usr/local/cuda-12.6/lib64/libnvrtc.so /usr/local/cuda-12.6/lib64/libnvToolsExt.so /usr/local/cuda-12.6/lib64/libcudart.so /home/g/anaconda3/envs/g308/lib/python3.8/site-packages/torch/lib/libc10_cuda.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libglfw.so.3.3 -ldl -lpthread -Wl,--no-as-needed,"/home/g/anaconda3/envs/g308/lib/python3.8/site-packages/torch/lib/libtorch_cpu.so" -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,--no-as-needed,"/home/g/anaconda3/envs/g308/lib/python3.8/site-packages/torch/lib/libtorch_cuda.so" -Wl,--as-needed /home/g/anaconda3/envs/g308/lib/python3.8/site-packages/torch/lib/libc10_cuda.so /home/g/anaconda3/envs/g308/lib/python3.8/site-packages/torch/lib/libc10.so /usr/local/cuda-12.6/lib64/libcudart.so /usr/local/cuda-12.6/lib64/libnvToolsExt.so -Wl,--no-as-needed,"/home/g/anaconda3/envs/g308/lib/python3.8/site-packages/torch/lib/libtorch.so" -Wl,--as-needed /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
